_publications._publicationTitle: Reprogramming Captures the Genetic and Tumorigenic Properties of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: confirming a statistically significant higher proliferation rate in NF1(−/−) cells, both at 7 and at 30 days of SC differentiation, compared with control NF1(+/+) and NF1(+/−) cell lines
details: Statistically significant higher proliferation rate at both 7 and 30 days of SC differentiation compared to control NF1(+/+) and NF1(+/-) cell lines, with continuous high proliferation capacity
